zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Tailboys於1391年出生在英國林可爾史爾諾斯 吉時，他的父親Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme42歲，母親Margaret Deincourt38歲。他於1415年與Lady Alice Stafford在英國達勒姆達勒姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭倫敦被列為sheriff of london。他去世於1444年4月13日在英國林可爾史爾吉享年53歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Tailboys于1391年出生在英国林可爾史爾諾斯 吉时，他的父亲Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme42岁，母亲Margaret Deincourt38岁。他于1415年与Lady Alice Stafford在英国達勒姆達勒姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰倫敦被列为sheriff of london。他去世于1444年4月13日在英国林可爾史爾吉享年53岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

nameMeanings.name: Tailboys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Talboys
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Tailboys was born in 1391, in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Deincourt, was 38. He married Lady Alice Stafford in 1415, in Durham, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff of london in London, England, United Kingdom. He died on 13 April 1444, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Tailboys est né en 1391, à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Deincourt, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Stafford en 1415, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of london à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1444, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Tailboys 1391 in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Deincourt 38. Er hat 1415 in Durham, Durham, England Lady Alice Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of london in London, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. April 1444 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Tailboys è nato il nel 1391 nel North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Deincourt, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Stafford nel 1415, nel Durham, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of london nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 13 aprile 1444, nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Tailboysが1391年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kymeは42歳，母Margaret Deincourtは38歳であった。1415年にイギリスダルハムダルハムでLady Alice Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスロンドンでの職業はsheriff of londonと記録されている。彼は1444年4月13日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで53歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Tailboys(이)가 1391년 영국 링코실르 노르스 키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Deincourt(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1415년 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 Lady Alice Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 sheriff of london이었다. 그는 1444년 4월 13일 영국 링코실르 키에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 노르스 키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Tailboys nasceu em 1391, em North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Deincourt, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Stafford em 1415, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of london em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1444, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Tailboys родился в 1391 г. в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Deincourt, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Stafford в 1415 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of london в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 13 апреля 1444 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Tailboys nació en 1391, en North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Deincourt, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Stafford en 1415, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of london en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 13 de abril de 1444, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
